extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Studio Web in the Agent Builder workspace, with the Explorer panel open for the ServiceNow Incidents Management Solution. The plus menu in the Explorer is expanded under “Add project to solution,” displaying options to add new project types or import an existing one. The “Import existing” option and the + button are highlighted, indicating the next action.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Click on the + button in the Explorer panel.
2. In the “Add project to solution” menu, click on “Import existing.”
